title: Missouri Revised Statutes § 249.957 - Tax and special tax bills in certain sections applicable to sewer and storm water facility improvement districts
text:
249.957.  Tax and special tax bills in certain sections applicable to sewer and storm water facility improvement districts. — The tax and special tax bills provided for in sections 249.430, 249.520, 249.530 and 249.580 to* 249.650 shall be applicable to the assessments detailed in sections 249.925 to 249.955.
(L. 1995 H.B. 88 § 20) 
*Word "through" appears in original rolls.
